Description:
Serena is a free, open-source coding agent toolkit that turns your AI assistant into a fully-featured IDE-powered dev partner.

It plugs into tools like Copilot CLI, VS Code, and more via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), giving AI agents the ability to navigate and edit code at the symbol level - not just line by line. With support for 40+ programming languages, Serena is one of the most powerful ways to supercharge your AI coding workflow today.

Join us for a chat with AI Researcher Michael Panchenko.
Author: GitHub
Title: Open Source Friday with Serena
